data.title: SLB Profit Falls as Iran War Disrupts Operations, Clouds Outlook
data.description: SLB’s first-quarter profit fell in the face of what Chief Executive Olivier Le Peuch called a challenging start to the year, as widespread disruptions across the Middle East hurt business.
data.author: Connor Hart
